case_title: OYAFUSO, ROSALINDA VS ZUNIGA, SARAH et al

docket_entries.description: DEFT'S REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE, DENIED. NO $10.00 FEE PAID. COPY OF DENIAL ORDER SENT TO SARAH ZUNIGA.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT ZUNIGA, SARAH ENTERPRISE RENT-A-CAR COMPANY OF SAN FRANCISCO
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-15-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUL-17-2003 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST TO RE-SERVE DEFENDANT ZUNIGA.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OYAFUSO, ROSALINDA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZUNIGA, SARAH ENTERPRISE RENT-A-CAR COMPANY OF SAN FRANCISCO $4,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $42.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,242.00, DEFENDNAT ZUNIGA 33 1/2% AT FAULT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

DEFT'S REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE SUBMITTED TO COURT FOR ORDER.
